children.heading: Extent of recovery
children.label: b Extent of recovery
children.text: A responsible party who is entitled to a limitation of liability may assert a claim under only to the extent that the sum of the removal costs and damages incurred by the responsible party plus the amounts paid by the responsible party, or by the guarantor on behalf of the responsible party, for claims asserted under exceeds the amount to which the total of the liability under and removal costs and damages incurred by, or on behalf of, the responsible party is limited under .section 2713 of this titlesection 2713 of this titlesection 2702 of this titlesection 2704 of this title
